senators.name: Sen. Dale Briggs
senators.notNerdReason: Repeatedly denied peer-reviewed climate science on Senate floor. Defunded EPA research grants. Opposed evidence-based sex education despite CDC data on teen pregnancy.

senators.name: Sen. Marcus Webb
senators.notNerdReason: Dismissed USDA agricultural data in favor of industry talking points. Voted to cut National Weather Service funding. However, does cite DOD and economic data selectively.

TX-07.name: Dr. Priya Nair
TX-07.nerdReason: M.D. cardiologist. Consistently cites AHA and WHO data. Authored the Healthcare Cost Transparency Act using CMS data analysis.

TX-21.name: Rep. Conner Hughes
TX-21.notNerdReason: Voted against National Science Foundation funding. Cited debunked statistics on immigration crime. Opposed USGS earthquake monitoring expansion.
